description_long: This is a classic wooden barrel with a slightly bulging cylindrical shape, constructed from vertical wooden staves held together by five evenly spaced, wide metal hoops. The wood has a warm, medium-brown tone with visible grain patterns, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The metal bands are a matte gray, each fastened with small, round rivets for reinforcement. The top and bottom surfaces are flat and made of the same wood as the sides, with the top surface showing subtle wood grain and a seamless fit. There are no visible handles, spouts, or openings, and the exterior is free from any labels or markings. The overall design suggests it is intended for storage or transport of goods, commonly seen in urban or industrial settings.
description: A medium-brown wooden barrel with five gray metal hoops and a flat wooden top, featuring a rustic, reinforced design. The surface is smooth with visible wood grain and no handles or markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full height of the barrel, the curvature of the staves, and all five metal hoops clearly.
description_view_1: Side view with a similar profile, highlighting the even spacing of the metal hoops and the smooth, uninterrupted wood grain.
description_view_2: Another side view, showing the metal hoops' rivets more prominently and the consistent wood texture.
description_view_3: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, with the same arrangement of hoops and wood grain, no distinguishing features.
